# Codex Telegram Bridge v0.3.1

This release fixes Review status presentation and dashboard update scheduling after Review
turns complete.

## Highlights

- Keeps an in-progress Review visible while the previous generic turn status is terminal.
- Restores dashboard debounce behavior for ordinary work after a Review completes, fails, or is
  interrupted.
- Preserves the observed TUI mode in status rendering and keeps active Review dashboards animated
  when a Goal is already complete.

## Upgrade notes

- Existing credentials, Telegram bindings, Codex state, session spaces, and installer-owned units
  are preserved by the v0.3.1 installer.
- The supported installer host remains Ubuntu or Debian under WSL2 with systemd and Python 3.14.
